mapper.select: SELECT id, account, password, nick_name, phone, email, avatar_url, status, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, deleted FROM sys_user WHERE account = #{account} AND deleted = 0
SELECT id, account, password, nick_name, phone, email, avatar_url, status, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, deleted FROM sys_user WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT r.code FROM sys_role r INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.status = 1 AND r.deleted = 0
